g.title: TB_LEFT_PWR
g.text: Motor supply only. VM is the protected raw motor rail. VCC and STBY are generated locally on the PDB.

g.title: TB_RIGHT_PWR
g.text: Motor supply only. VM is the protected raw motor rail. VCC and STBY are generated locally on the PDB.

g.title: PICO_AUDIO_I2S
g.text: Only these signals plus power and ground are needed when the Audio Pack is not stacked directly on the Pico.

g.title: AUDIO_PACK1
g.text: If the pack is stacked directly on the Pico, this fly-lead harness collapses into the board-to-board header.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_LCD
g.text: These are the six remaining free GPIO once motors, the HC-SR04 pair, and the reserved GP18 and GP19 servo outputs are accounted for. The LCD 5 V supply shown here is the control-board `5V_FILT` rail, not Pico USB `VBUS`.

g.title: LCD_BACKLIGHT
g.text: LEDA should include an inline ~220 Ohm series resistor if the module does not already provide one.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_USB
g.text: USB link to the Raspberry Pi 3B. Host `VBUS` stays on the USB connector for attach detect and programming, but the PCB powers the Pico from `AUX_5V` into `VSYS` through a reverse-blocking ideal-diode path.

g.title: TB_LEFT_CTRL
g.text: One TB6612FNG stage drives the front-left and rear-left motors. VCC and STBY stay local on the PDB driver-logic rail.

g.title: TB_RIGHT_CTRL
g.text: One TB6612FNG stage drives the front-right and rear-right motors. VCC and STBY stay local on the PDB driver-logic rail.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_SENSOR
g.text: Two HC-SR04 modules share one 4-channel BSS138 level shifter. The sensor `HV` rail is the control-board `5V_FILT` net.

g.title: LEVEL_SHIFT1
g.text: Four independent BSS138 channels with 10 kOhm pullups. All four channels are used by the left and right HC-SR04 TRIG/ECHO pairs.

g.title: US1
g.text: 2 cm to 4 m, about 15 mA, 10 us trigger pulse. Forward-left obstacle sensor.

g.title: US2
g.text: 2 cm to 4 m, about 15 mA, 10 us trigger pulse. Forward-right obstacle sensor.

g.title: PICO_CTRL_SERVO
g.text: Reserved hardware servo PWM outputs. Not yet bound in motion-controller firmware.

g.title: SERVO_BUS_PAN
g.text: Combines Pico PWM with the dedicated 6 V servo rail.

g.title: SERVO_BUS_TILT
g.text: Combines Pico PWM with the dedicated 6 V servo rail.
